How it all started

A love adventure 🗺️

🕹️
2020
The Quarantine Duo 🎮
While the world was on pause, Melissa and Herman were busy waging war — online. Covid couldn't stop their competitive streak, and intense gaming showdowns somehow turned into something more.
🎯
Level Up
Virtual → Real Life 🔫
Those virtual battles had to spill into real life. Paintball. Obviously. A wild and bruise-filled upgrade — but hey, nothing says romance like dodging each other's shots.
💥
Plot Twist
An Unexpected Explosion 💥
Not every chapter goes to plan. An unexpected explosion became part of their story — not exactly scripted for laughs, but it added a uniquely HerMel twist that makes for one heck of a story to tell at dinner parties.
🌍
3 Years
Around the World ✈️
Three years. One suitcase each. The whole world. Melissa and Herman traded a fixed address for adventures across continents — and somehow became more "them" with every time zone crossed.
🏡
Now
Briefly Grounded... 😏
They've landed in the Netherlands for now. But "settled" is relative for HerMel. The bags are never quite unpacked, the next adventure is always just around the corner — and this wedding is the greatest one yet.

Will you join us?

RSVP 🎟️

Let us know you're coming so we can plan the party of a lifetime — exact date and venue TBC, but save August 2027!

🎉

You're on the list!

We'll be in touch with all the details as August 2027 gets closer. Until then — keep your dancing shoes ready!

💍
See you in August 2027!
